'''Task Force Blackvine''' was one of the original five [[Task force/Legends|task forces]] of the [[New Republic Fifth Fleet]], and was created some time before [[16 ABY/Legends|16 ABY]].

It was commanded by [[Commodore/Legends|Commodore]] [[Tolsk]]. Task Force Aster was completely composed of [[New Class Modernization Program|New Class]] warships.

This particular task force was composed of only twenty warships compared to the standard twenty-one warships.

Task Force Blackvine fought at the [[Battle of Doornik-319]] and also the [[Battle of N'zoth]].

==Known ships==
*1 [[Endurance-class fleet carrier|''Endurance''-class fleet carrier]]
**''[[Venture]]''
